name: MemoryCurve - Ebbinghaus Spaced Repetition + Email Reminders

nodes.name: Webhook: New Lesson
nodes.notes: Receives POST data when a new lesson is created. Expected body: { topic_name, lesson_id, timestamp, demo_mode, user_email }

nodes.name: Compute Intervals
nodes.notes: JavaScript node that computes all reminder timestamps based on the Ebbinghaus forgetting curve. Outputs one item per reminder.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lesson_id: { stringValue: $json.lesson_id }, topic_name: { stringValue: $json.topic_name }, interval_label: { stringValue: $json.interval_label }, scheduled_time: { stringValue: $json.scheduled_time }, sent_status: { booleanValue: false }, feedback: { nullValue: null } }) }}

nodes.name: Write Reminders to Firestore
nodes.notes: Writes each computed reminder to the Firestore 'reminders' collection via REST API. Replace YOUR_PROJECT_ID with your Firebase project ID.

nodes.name: Build Notification
nodes.notes: Formats the notification payload for email delivery.

nodes.name: Send Email via EmailJS
nodes.notes: Sends the study reminder email to the user via EmailJS REST API. Uses the same EmailJS credentials as the frontend app.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Reminders scheduled & email sent', topic: $json.title }) }}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns a success response to the calling application.

nodes.name: Webhook: Feedback
nodes.notes: Receives user feedback (remembered/forgot) for adaptive interval adjustment. Body: { reminder_id, lesson_id, feedback, interval_label }

nodes.name: Adjust Future Intervals
nodes.notes: Computes the adaptive adjustment based on user feedback. This multiplier can be applied to future intervals for this lesson.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, feedback: $json.feedback, message: $json.message, multiplier: $json.adjustment_multiplier }) }}

nodes.name: Respond Feedback
nodes.notes: Returns the adjustment result to the calling application.
